# Oktuv Global

> Oktuv is an elite Web, AI & Growth Agency. We build digital revenue engines by combining modern web architecture (Next.js), AI automation, and data-driven performance marketing.

## About
Oktuv helps modern B2B SaaS and eCommerce brands scale. We replace outdated WordPress monoliths with lightning-fast Next.js apps, automate customer support and analytics with Agentic AI, and drive growth with performance marketing.

## Solutions
- [Custom SaaS Build](https://www.oktuvglobal.com/solutions/build/)

- [Digital Transformation](https://www.oktuvglobal.com/solutions/transform/)
- [Customer Engagement](https://www.oktuvglobal.com/solutions/engage/)

## Platform
- [FlowAI Analytics](https://www.oktuvglobal.com/platform/flowai/): AI-powered agentic analytics platform.
- [FlowBot](https://www.oktuvglobal.com/platform/flowbot/): Autonomous AI chatbot and relationship agent.

## Core Capabilities FAQ
Q: What tech stack do you use for web development?
A: We specialize in modern JavaScript ecosystems, primarily React, Next.js, and Node.js. This allows us to build extremely fast, SEO-friendly, and scalable web applications.

Q: How do you ensure the web application is secure?
A: We implement industry-standard security protocols including JWT authentication, CSRF protection, and rigorous API validation to protect your data.

Q: What kind of AI automation do you build?
A: We build custom AI agents, automated customer support bots, RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) systems, and internal workflow automations using models like OpenAI and Anthropic.

Q: Can AI integrate with our existing software?
A: Yes, we can seamlessly integrate custom AI workflows into your existing CRM, ERP, or internal databases via custom API layers.

Q: Does Headless commerce improve SEO?
A: Significantly. By utilizing Next.js Server-Side Rendering (SSR), your store will achieve sub-second load times and perfect Core Web Vitals, which are massive ranking factors for Google.
